name: Active Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2607.11720v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Background: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) enables effective policies to be trained from large, previously collected datasets and subsequently improved through limited online interaction. This offline-to-online RL (O2O-RL) paradigm is particularly promising in nonstationary domains where interaction is costly or potentially hazardous. Stand...
author: Alper Kamil Bozkurt, Shangtong Zhang, Yuichi Motai
